testcase.name: createOrderReturnsCreatedOrder
testcase.system-out:
13:09:12.511 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.foodordering.orderservice.controller.FoodOrderControllerIntegrationTest]: FoodOrderControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:09:12.630 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.foodordering.orderservice.OrderServiceApplication for test class com.foodordering.orderservice.controller.FoodOrderControllerIntegrationTest 13:09:12.675 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/sagee/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: getOrderByIdReturnsNotFoundForMissingOrder
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-28T13:09:14.360+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.orderservice.controller.FoodOrderController#getOrderById(Long) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.364+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.foodordering.orderservice.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleResourceNotFound(ResourceNotFoundException, HttpServletRequest) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.368+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.372+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ApiErrorResponse[timestamp=2026-03-28T13:09:14.364895, status=404, error=Not Found, message=Order no (truncated)...] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.373+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [com.foodordering.orderservice.exception.ResourceNotFoundException: Order not found with id 999]

testcase.name: deleteOrderReturnsNoContent

testcase.name: updateOrderStatusReturnsUpdatedOrder

testcase.name: createOrderReturnsNotFoundForMissingCustomer
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-28T13:09:14.463+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.orderservice.controller.FoodOrderController#createOrder(FoodOrderRequest) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.464+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Read "application/json;charset=UTF-8" to [com.foodordering.orderservice.dto.FoodOrderRequest@403f7aa2] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.465+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.foodordering.orderservice.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleResourceNotFound(ResourceNotFoundException, HttpServletRequest) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.465+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.465+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ApiErrorResponse[timestamp=2026-03-28T13:09:14.465213, status=404, error=Not Found, message=Customer (truncated)...] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.465+05:30 DEBUG 44426 --- [order-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [com.foodordering.orderservice.exception.ResourceNotFoundException: Customer not found with id 999]
